description: Rogue Frontier Patch 1 (12 February 2025) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

subsections.heading: Item Destruction

items.text: Items can no longer be destroyed if a player is ejected from the Roads of Avalon
Many item types that previously did not create a trash item upon destruction (e.g. consumable items) began to do so with the Rogue Frontier update

subitems.text: This has been reverted, and those items once again do not generate trash

items.text: In addition, we would like to clarify the changed rate of item destruction in the Rogue Frontier update

subitems.text: Equipable items had their destruction rate increased from 30% to 33%
Non-equipable items had their destruction rate decreased from 36% to 33%
These rates have not changed at all in this patch

subsections.searchable_text: Item Destruction Items can no longer be destroyed if a player is ejected from the Roads of Avalon Many item types that previously did not create a trash item upon destruction (e.g. consumable items) began to do so with the Rogue Frontier update This has been reverted, and those items once again do not generate trash In addition, we would like to clarify the changed rate of item destruction in the Rogue Frontier update Equipable items had their destruction rate increased from 30% to 33% Non-equipable items had their destruction rate decreased from 36% to 33% These rates have not changed at all in this patch

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Energy destruction from Territory Raiding has been increased from 10% to 20%

subsections.searchable_text: Other Changes Energy destruction from Territory Raiding has been increased from 10% to 20%

sections.searchable_text: Changes Item Destruction Items can no longer be destroyed if a player is ejected from the Roads of Avalon Many item types that previously did not create a trash item upon destruction (e.g. consumable items) began to do so with the Rogue Frontier update In addition, we would like to clarify the changed rate of item destruction in the Rogue Frontier update Other Changes Energy destruction from Territory Raiding has been increased from 10% to 20%

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.description: Relentless Assault’s damage has been increased, to help Crystal Reaper find its place in the meta.

items.text: Relentless Assault (Crystal Reaper)

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Relentless Assault’s damage has been increased, to help Crystal Reaper find its place in the meta. Relentless Assault (Crystal Reaper) Damage: 90 → 105

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.description: Skystrider Bow’s Sky Bolts now deal more damage and hit more easily, especially against close-range targets.

items.text: Sky's Fury (Skystrider Bow)
Undead Arrows (Whispering Bow)

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Skystrider Bow’s Sky Bolts now deal more damage and hit more easily, especially against close-range targets. Sky's Fury (Skystrider Bow) Dash range: 7m → 10m Buff duration: 3.5s → 3.75s Damage per bolt: 130 → 140 Bolt hit delay: 0.6s → 0.4s Undead Arrows (Whispering Bow) Cooldown: 12s → 10s

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.description: Hoarfrost has received a significant buff to increase its baseline effectiveness.

items.text: Avalanche (Hoarfrost Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Hoarfrost has received a significant buff to increase its baseline effectiveness. Avalanche (Hoarfrost Staff) Snowball damage: 60 → 120 Snowball Knockback distance: 5m → 10m (knockback duration unchanged) Increased slow trail width: 4m → 5m

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.description: Pulse Shock is intended to support melee-oriented transformations, but not so strong as to be the default damaging Q. Therefore, its damage has been reduced.

items.text: Pulse Shock (all Shapeshifter Staffs)
Shadow Panther Transform (Prowling Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Pulse Shock is intended to support melee-oriented transformations, but not so strong as to be the default damaging Q. Therefore, its damage has been reduced. Pulse Shock (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Damage: 109 → 97 Shadow Panther Transform (Prowling Staff) Transformation movement speed: 6.5 → 5.5

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.description: Purifying Combination's cooldown has been increased to remove some of Fists of Avalon’s power as a non-commital mobility option.

items.text: Purifying Combination (Fists of Avalon)

subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Purifying Combination's cooldown has been increased to remove some of Fists of Avalon’s power as a non-commital mobility option. Purifying Combination (Fists of Avalon) Dive Kick cooldown: 20s → 25s

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.description: Circle of Inspiration’s maximum targets have been increased to make Druid Cowl more suitable for large groups.

items.text: Circle of Inspiration (Druid Cowl)

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Circle of Inspiration’s maximum targets have been increased to make Druid Cowl more suitable for large groups. Circle of Inspiration (Druid Cowl) Max targets: 5 → 10

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Evasive Jump (Royal Shoes): Fixed issue where immunities could incorrectly be purged
Infernal Boulder (Hellfire Hands): Fixed issue where a line of sight was required
Sky Bolt (Skystrider Bow): Fixed issue where a line of sight was required

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Evasive Jump (Royal Shoes): Fixed issue where immunities could incorrectly be purged Infernal Boulder (Hellfire Hands): Fixed issue where a line of sight was required Sky Bolt (Skystrider Bow): Fixed issue where a line of sight was required

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where islands would sometimes not be selectable in the Travel Planner UI
Fixed issue where linking Kill Trophies in chat would not display correctly
Fixed issue where it was not possible to reach Elite Levels on the Destiny Board using the Learn button
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where chat channel buttons would not work
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where long-pressing in various UIs would fail to bring up tooltips

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Small Treasure Chests had gone missing from red zones

subsections.searchable_text: Other Fixes Fixed issue where Small Treasure Chests had gone missing from red zones
